metadata_value: The system must support real-time occupancy tracking for up to 5,000 parking spaces.
The system must integrate with the existing City enforcement application via REST API.
The vendor must provide 24/7 technical support with a 2-hour SLA.
The solution must be fully PCI-DSS compliant for payment processing.
Hardware components must operate in temperatures ranging from -20°C to 50°C.
